_about: Accumulating symbol/label/comment/data file for the Jeopardy! 25th Anniversary (NES) disassembly. Keys are 'BANK:CPUADDR' (hex addr). Feed to tools/disasm6502.py via --syms to get annotated listings. Grows as the ROM is mapped; see docs/ for the analysis behind each name.

comments.0:8000: JMP ($0007): every bank entry; far-call lands here
comments.0:9027: RNG: stir-the-pot accumulator ($02/$03/$FE) + frame ctr $01 + live RAM
comments.0:82B1: fill the 6 board categories: random bag, no repeats
comments.0:830C: draw one slot: (RNG mod $12)+$0F cell, pick unused slot 0-5
comments.0:8DF9: contestant name pool, 6-char records, ',' ($2C)-padded text codec
comments.0:8E5C: pick a CPU name from NamePool, re-roll on collision
comments.0:8F0C: pick a CPU face/attribute, dedup vs $05D1
comments.0:A7F2: roll each CPU buzz delay = ReactionTimeTable[(RNG&3)+difficulty $9B]
comments.0:A80D: buzz delays in frames; $FF = 'does not know it' (timer >= $D8 never fires)
comments.0:9733: per-frame buzz poll: tick $8F/$90, first to 0 buzzes in
comments.0:9A7F: place Daily Double(s) in random board cell(s) $9F/$A0 (0-29), deduped
comments.0:92BE: bank-0 vblank NMI: force bank0/NT-A, OAM DMA, palette flush, INC $01
comments.0:92D7: copy zero-page palette mirror $44..$63 to PPU $3F00
comments.0:FF80: far-call trampoline: A=bank, X=$80xx slot, Y=return bank
comments.0:FF94: reset: SEI, latch bank 0, JMP ColdBoot (same in all 4 banks)
